info.description: This is an Express server used to manage identity provider services. Users manage services by creating requests handled by administrators. You can find out more about the project on the [github page](https://github.com/rciam/rciam-federation-registry) or you can try it out live  [here](http://service-registry.aai-dev.grnet.gr/egi).
info.title: Federation Registry

get.description: This route redirects user to the tenants proxy authentication server where user is prompted to choose an identity provider and login.

get.summary: Exchange one time code with access token
get.description: Used to get access token issued from the authentication proxy on login.

parameters.description: One time code returned after login

get.summary: Redirects user back to react app after login
get.description: This route handles redirects from the authentication proxy following Authorization Code Flow, saves user to db links access_token to a one time code and then redirects to react app sending also the code.

get.description: Returns service contact recipients matching the requested contact types, environments, and protocols for the target tenant.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: contact_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated contact types to include

parameters.name: environments
parameters.description: Comma-separated integration environments to include

parameters.name: protocols
parameters.description: Comma-separated protocols to include

put.description: Sends notification emails to the provided owner recipients. Supports the placeholder '--* Reconfiguration Link *--' inside email_body.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Owner notification data

email_address.description: Email address of the notification sender

email_body.description: Notification body. May include '--* Reconfiguration Link *--' placeholder.

service_id.description: Optional service id used to build the reconfiguration link

petition_id.description: Optional petition id used to build the reconfiguration link

put.description: Sends notifications to owners of outdated services for the specified integration environment.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Outdated notification filter

put.description: Sends notification emails to service contacts that match the provided filters. Optionally includes tenant notification admins in CC.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Broadcast notification data

email_address.description: Email address of the notification sender

notify_admins.description: If true, also adds users with send_notifications permission as CC

notified_users.description: Number of users that the notification was sent to

parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of service to return

state.description: The deployment state of the service

last_edited.description: Timestamp of the last successful deployment of the service

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of petition to review

get.description: Returns paginated service information for creating a service list

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the response

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The page size determining the number of services contained in each page of the response

parameters.name: owned
parameters.description: If true returns only services and petitions owned by requesting user

parameters.name: pending
parameters.description: If true returns only services that have open petitions

parameters.name: search_string
parameters.description: Returns only services and petitions that contain the provided string

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Returns only services of the selected protocol

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Returns only services deployed in selected integration environment

parameters.name: request_review
parameters.description: Returns only services that are in review requested state

parameters.name: outdated
parameters.description: Returns only services that have invalid configuration

parameters.name: pending_sub
parameters.description: Sub filter for services with pending requests based on the review state of the request

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: Returns only services that have a deployment error

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filters results based on tags, supports multiple comma separated values

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter results based on creation/registration date, returns services created after given date. Format:(yyyy/mm/dd)

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter results based on creation/registration date, returns services created before given date. Format:(yyyy/mm/dd)

get.description: Returns services for a tenant. This endpoint allows unauthenticated requests, but additional fields may be returned for authorized users.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to include

parameters.name: exclude_tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to exclude

parameters.name: outdated
parameters.description: If true, returns the list of outdated services

post.description: Admin endpoint used to bootstrap a tenant or import multiple services directly into the registry.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tenant that the request is targeting

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Array of services to add to the registry

get.description: Route used from ams-agent to get all service configuration awaiting deployment and push them to the ams topic

parameters.description: AMS formatted messages containing results for deployment requests

get.description: Route used to verify push subscription ownership for AMS integration.

put.description: Route used by ams agent to update state once service changes have been push to the ams

get.description: Checks if an OIDC client_id or SAML entity_id is available for the given tenant and environment.

parameters.description: Service id to exclude from the uniqueness check

get.description: Route used by ams-agent to fetch the full deployer agent configuration list.
Fetches a SAML metadata XML document from the provided metadata_url, parses it, and returns the entity_id together with supported and unsupported requested attributes.

parameters.name: metadata_url
parameters.description: URL-encoded metadata XML URL to fetch and inspect

entity_id.description: SAML entityID extracted from the metadata

supported_attributes.description: Requested attributes that are supported by the default registry attribute set

unsupported_attributes.description: Requested attributes found in the metadata but not supported by the default registry attribute set

metadata_url.description: Resolved metadata URL used for the request

404.description: Could not fetch or parse the metadata document

access_tokenAuth.name: Authorization
access_tokenAuth.description: Bearer access token in the form: Bearer <token>

ror_id.description: The id of the organization on the ror.org dataset

service_id.description: Required on edit and delete petition requests

logo_uri.description: URL that points to an image

policy_uri.description: URL for the Policy Statement of this service

allow_introspection.description: Allow calls to the Introspection Endpoint. For oidc services.

code_challenge_method.description: Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE) Code Challenge Method. For oidc services.

token_endpoint_auth_method.description: Authentication method for token endpoint, oidc specific

application_type.description: Application type of the service, oidc specific

token_endpoint_auth_signing_alg.description: Signing algorithm for the token endpoint, oidc specific

jwks.description: Public key value for the token endpoint, oidc specific

jwks_uri.description: Uri containing public key for the token endpoint, oidc specific

website_url.description: Website Url containing information about the service

items.description: Allowed Redirect uris for the service

generate_client_secret.description: Prompts backend to generate value for client secret. Oidc specific

reuse_refresh_tokens.description: Adds the offline_access scope to the client's scope, oidc specific

code_of_conduct_field.description: There could be multiple code of contact fields with different depending on the tenant some of them might be required to be true.

logo_uri.description: URL that points to an image

policy_uri.description: URL for the Policy Statement of this service

aup_uri.description: URL that contains the Acceptable Use Policy for the users of the service

organization_id.description: The unique identifier of the Organization of the Service

allow_introspection.description: Allow calls to the Introspection Endpoint. For oidc services.

code_challenge_method.description: Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE) Code Challenge Method. For oidc services.

token_endpoint_auth_method.description: Authentication method for token endpoint, oidc specific

application_type.description: Application type of the service, oidc specific

token_endpoint_auth_signing_alg.description: Signing algorithm for the token endpoint, oidc specific

jwks.description: Public key value for the token endpoint, oidc specific

jwks_uri.description: Uri containing public key for the token endpoint, oidc specific

country.description: Country of the organisation of the service

website_url.description: Website Url containing information about the service

items.description: Allowed Redirect uris for the service

generate_client_secret.description: Prompts backend to generate value for client secret. Oidc specific

reuse_refresh_tokens.description: Adds the offline_access scope to the client's scope, oidc specific

code_of_conduct_field.description: There could be multiple code of contact fields with different depending on the tenant some of them might be required to be true.

outdated_count.description: Total Services available to the user that have invalid configuration

request_review_count.description: Total Services available to the user that are on the request_review state

full_count.description: Total Services matching the request query filters and are available to the user

comment.description: Comment from admin on pending request

last_edited.description: Timestamp of the last request that was made for this service

owned.description: True if user is a member of the service owners group

owners.description: An array containing the email of the owners of the service

organization_name.description: The name of the organization the service blongs to.

website_url.description: Website Url containing information about the service

notification.description: True if there is a nitification for the service

outdated.description: True if Service has invalid configuration

group_manager.description: True if the User is a manager of the service owners group

group_id.description: Id of the service owners group

type.description: Type of pending petition if exists

logo_uri.description: URL that points to a logo image

created_at.description: Date that the service was created

type.description: Color and style of the alert banner

priority.description: Banner Alerts are being shown one at a time based on priority

active.description: Only Banner Alerts that are active are shown for each tenant
